APR_02: [U+ Works] Document of the <%= drftUserName %> finally approved.
APR_06: [U+ Works] Document designated as a CC received.
APR_07: [U+ Works] Document requested by <%= senderName %> not approved.
APR_08: [U+ Works] Document requested by <%= senderName %> automatically approved.
APR_09: [U+ Works] Document requested by <%= senderName %> automatically approved.
APR_10: [U+ Works] Document requested by <%= senderName %> modified.
APR_12: [U+ Works] Document designated as a viewer received.
APR_13: [U+ Works] Document of the <%= senderName %> retrieved.
APR_14: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> returned the document to the previous approval path.
DOC_01: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> registered the new file(folder) on the WebDisk.
DOC_02: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> modified the file(folder) on the WebDisk.
DOC_03: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> deleted the file(folder) on the WebDisk.
DOC_04: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> shared the file(folder) on the WebDisk.
SCH_01: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> registered the new schedule.
SCH_03: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %>'s schedule starts at <%= remainingTime %>.
SCH_04: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> invited you to the schedule.
BRD_01: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> registered the new post.
BRD_04: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> registered the reply post.
BRD_06: [U+ Works] Registration of the post approved.
BRD_07: [U+ Works] Registration of the post returned.
BRD_08: [U+ Works] <%= senderName %> requested approval for posting.
JNL_01: [U+ Works] Opinion registered on the Work Log(Task/Work Reqeust/Work Report) of the <%= writerName %>.
JNL_02: [U+ Works] Work Log(Task/Work Reqeust/Work Report) of the <%= writerName %> modified.
JNL_03: [U+ Works] Work Report of the <%= writerName %> received.
JNL_04: [U+ Works] Work Request of the <%= writerName %> received.
JNL_05: [U+ Works] Work Request of the <%= writerName %> approved.
JNL_06: [U+ Works] Work Request of the <%= writerName %> returned.
JNL_07: [U+ Works] Work Request of the <%= writerName %> transferred.
JNL_08: [U+ Works] Task of the <%= writerName %> received.
